image:image.image:caption: Stop Work Order issued by City of Watertown due to lack of permits for Maestro Renovation project
image:image.image:title: Maestro Renovation Stop Work Order

image:image.image:caption: Incorrect piping that had to be later fixed by a licensed plumber
image:image.image:title: Maestro Renovation Incorrect Plumbing

image:image.image:caption: Piping after inspection and correction by a licensed plumber
image:image.image:title: Corrected Plumbing After Licensed Plumber Inspection

image:image.image:caption: Water pouring down the wall because the pipe was cut and the water wasn't turned off
image:image.image:title: Maestro Renovation Water Damage from Unsecured Pipe

image:image.image:caption: Copper pipe with a hole patched caused by an unsecured electrical wire
image:image.image:title: Electrical Hazard from Maestro Renovation Work

image:image.image:caption: Wire that was originally left unsecured and caused the hole in the copper pipe
image:image.image:title: Unsecured Electrical Wire from Maestro Renovation

image:image.image:caption: Flooring installation as seen from underneath showing quality issues
image:image.image:title: Maestro Renovation Flooring Quality Issues

image:image.image:caption: Shower shelf on the 1st floor that is too small and doesn't match the one on the 2nd floor
image:image.image:title: Maestro Renovation Tiling and Shelf Issues

image:image.image:caption: Caulking around the bathtub that had to be redone several times over six months
image:image.image:title: Maestro Renovation Poor Caulking Work
